name: Pickled Meats
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the salt, spices, sugar, and garlic together.
2. Rub the mixture thoroughly into the meat.
3. Place the meat in a pan, cover well, and refrigerate.
4. Turn the meat once a week or more to ensure even pickling.
5. To cook, place the meat in cold water and bring to a boil.
6. Discard the first water and cover the meat again with more cold water.
7. Bring the water back to a boil and reduce the heat to simmer gently until tender.
